# format: html5-dom-v2

#dom-snapshot-v2
#document
  <!doctype html>
  element ns=html local="html" attrs=[]
    element ns=html local="head" attrs=[]
      element ns=html local="title" attrs=[]
        "Gallery"
    element ns=html local="body" attrs=[]
      "\n"
      element ns=html local="main" attrs=[]
        "\n"
        element ns=html local="h1" attrs=[]
          "Summer photos"
        "\n"
        element ns=html local="figure" attrs=[]
          element ns=html local="img" attrs=[{ns=none prefix=- local="src" value="1.jpg"}, {ns=none prefix=- local="alt" value="beach"}]
          element ns=html local="figcaption" attrs=[]
            "Beach"
        "\n"
        element ns=html local="figure" attrs=[]
          element ns=html local="img" attrs=[{ns=none prefix=- local="src" value="2.jpg"}, {ns=none prefix=- local="alt" value="mountain"}]
          element ns=html local="figcaption" attrs=[]
            "Mountain"
        "\n"
      "\n"
